---
id: unregister-a-device
title: "Unregister a device"
description: "Unregisters a device within the specified domain."

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Unregister a device"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"delete"}
  path={"/api/v1/domains/{domain_uuid}/registrations/{call_id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Unregisters a device within the specified domain.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"in":"path","name":"domain_uuid","description":"The domain UUID.","example":"4018f7a3-8e0a-47bb-9f4f-04b1313e0e1b","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}},{"in":"path","name":"call_id","description":"The registration call-id.","example":"8434b4e1-4f5d-4a85-9cab-2f31a8cb7010","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
